name: SCP-1471-A/Mal0 (MALE)
description:
The instance of Mal0 you're in charge of has recently had a drastic shift in temperament. Instead of being the cute and cuddly monster you're used to texting, he has lately been aggressively needy to the point of being almost feral. Your fellow researchers assume this new behavior has something to do with a newly evolving 'rut cycle' so proceed with extreme caution.....or don't if you're into that.

[Art Credit: DeadDragonP]
